en: In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth.
zh: 起初， 神創造天地。

en: The earth was without form and void, and darkness was over the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God was hovering over the face of the waters.
zh: 地是空虛混沌；深淵上一片黑暗； 神的靈運行在水面上。

en: And God said, "Let there be light," and there was light.
zh: 神說：“要有光！”就有了光。

en: And God saw that the light was good. And God separated the light from the darkness.
zh: 神看光是好的，他就把光暗分開了。

en: God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, the first day.
zh: 神稱光為晝，稱暗為夜。有晚上，有早晨；這是第一日。

en: And God said, "Let there be an expanse in the midst of the waters, and let it separate the waters from the waters."
zh: 神說：“眾水之間要有穹蒼，把水和水分開！”事就這樣成了。

en: And God made the expanse and separated the waters that were under the expanse from the waters that were above the expanse. And it was so.
zh: 神造了穹蒼，把穹蒼以下的水和穹蒼以上的水分開了。

en: And God called the expanse Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, the second day.
zh: 神稱穹蒼為天。有晚上，有早晨；這是第二日。

en: And God said, "Let the waters under the heavens be gathered together into one place, and let the dry land appear." And it was so.
zh: 神說：“天下的水要聚在一處，使旱地露出來！”事就這樣成了。

en: God called the dry land Earth, and the waters that were gathered together he called Seas. And God saw that it was good.
zh: 神稱旱地為地，稱水的聚處為海。 神看這是好的。

en: And God said, "Let the earth sprout vegetation, plants yielding seed, and fruit trees bearing fruit in which is their seed, each according to its kind, on the earth." And it was so.
zh: 神說：“地上要長出青草、結種子的蔬菜和結果子的樹木，各從其類，在地上的果子都包著核！”事就這樣成了。

en: The earth brought forth vegetation, plants yielding seed according to their own kinds, and trees bearing fruit in which is their seed, each according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.
zh: 於是，地上長出了青草和結種子的蔬菜，各從其類；又長出結果子的樹木，各從其類，果子都包著核。 神看這是好的。

en: And there was evening and there was morning, the third day.
zh: 有晚上，有早晨；這是第三日。

en: And God said, "Let there be lights in the expanse of the heavens to separate the day from the night. And let them be for signs and for seasons, and for days and years,
zh: 神說：“在天上穹蒼中，要有光體來分晝夜；這些光體要作為記號，定節令、日子和年歲；

en: and let them be lights in the expanse of the heavens to give light upon the earth." And it was so.
zh: 它們要在天上穹蒼中發光，照耀地上！”事就這樣成了。

en: And God made the two great lights- the greater light to rule the day and the lesser light to rule the night- and the stars.
zh: 於是， 神造了兩個大光體，大的管晝，小的管夜；又造了星星。

en: And God set them in the expanse of the heavens to give light on the earth,
zh: 神把這些光體安放在天上穹蒼中，照耀地上，

en: to rule over the day and over the night, and to separate the light from the darkness. And God saw that it was good.
zh: 管晝夜，分光暗。 神看這是好的。

en: And there was evening and there was morning, the fourth day.
zh: 有晚上，有早晨；這是第四日。

en: And God said, "Let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the expanse of the heavens."
zh: 神說：“水要滋長生物；地上和天空之中，要有雀鳥飛翔！”

en: So God created the great sea creatures and every living creature that moves, with which the waters swarm, according to their kinds, and every winged bird according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.
zh: 於是， 神創造了大魚和在水中滋生各種能活動的生物，各從其類；又創造了各種有翅膀的飛鳥，各從其類。 神看這是好的。

en: And God blessed them, saying, "Be fruitful and multiply and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply on the earth."
zh: 神就賜福給牠們，說：“要繁衍增多，充滿海洋；雀鳥也要在地上增多！”

en: And there was evening and there was morning, the fifth day.
zh: 有晚上，有早晨；這是第五日。

en: And God said, "Let the earth bring forth living creatures according to their kinds- livestock and creeping things and beasts of the earth according to their kinds." And it was so.
zh: 神說：“地上要生出活物來，各從其類；牲畜、爬行的動物和地上的野獸，各從其類！”事就這樣成了。

en: And God made the beasts of the earth according to their kinds and the livestock according to their kinds, and everything that creeps on the ground according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.
zh: 於是， 神造了地上的野獸，各從其類；牲畜，各從其類；地上各種爬行的動物，各從其類。 神看這是好的。

en: Then God said, "Let us make man in our image, after our likeness. And let them have dominion over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the heavens and over the livestock and over all the earth and over every creeping thing that creeps on the earth."
zh: 神說：“我們要照著我們的形象，按著我們的樣式造人；使他們管理海裡的魚、空中的鳥、地上的牲畜，以及全地，和地上所有爬行的生物！”

en: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God he created him; male and female he created them.
zh: 於是， 神照著自己的形象創造人；就是照著 神的形象創造了他；他所創造的有男有女。

en: And God blessed them. And God said to them, "Be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth and subdue it and have dominion over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the heavens and over every living thing that moves on the earth."
zh: 神就賜福給他們，對他們說：“要繁衍增多，充滿這地，征服它；也要管理海裡的魚、空中的鳥和地上所有走動的生物。”

en: And God said, "Behold, I have given you every plant yielding seed that is on the face of all the earth, and every tree with seed in its fruit. You shall have them for food.
zh: 神說：“看哪！我把全地上結種子的各樣蔬菜，和一切果樹上有種子的果子，都賜給你們作食物。

en: And to every beast of the earth and to every bird of the heavens and to everything that creeps on the earth, everything that has the breath of life, I have given every green plant for food." And it was so.
zh: 至於地上的各種野獸，空中的各種飛鳥，和地上爬行有生命的各種活物，我把一切青草蔬菜賜給牠們作食物。”事就這樣成了。

en: And God saw everything that he had made, and behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
zh: 神看他所造的一切都很好。有晚上，有早晨；這是第六日。
